description: Stable error codes for Regenera Bank core, BFF, and channel surfaces.

errors.title: Invalid credentials
errors.message: Document or password is incorrect.

errors.title: Session expired
errors.message: Session is no longer valid. Authenticate again.

errors.title: Forbidden
errors.message: Principal lacks permission for the requested resource.

errors.title: Validation failed
errors.message: One or more fields failed validation.

errors.title: Invalid monetary amount
errors.message: Amount must be a decimal string; float is not accepted.

errors.title: Account not found
errors.message: No account matches the provided identifier.

errors.title: Account blocked
errors.message: Account is blocked for outbound operations.

errors.title: Insufficient funds
errors.message: Available balance is lower than the requested amount.

errors.title: Idempotency conflict
errors.message: Idempotency key was reused with a different payload.

errors.title: Operation in unknown state
errors.message: A previous attempt ended in UNKNOWN; reconcile before retrying.

errors.title: Invalid PIX key
errors.message: PIX key format or ownership validation failed.

errors.title: PIX rail unavailable
errors.message: PIX adapter did not respond in time; state may be UNKNOWN.

errors.title: PIX payment not found
errors.message: No PIX payment matches the provided identifier.

errors.title: Transfer not found
errors.message: No transfer matches the provided identifier.

errors.title: Invalid transfer destination
errors.message: Destination account metadata failed validation.

errors.title: Transfer rail unavailable
errors.message: Transfer adapter did not respond in time; state may be UNKNOWN.

errors.title: Ledger imbalance
errors.message: Debit and credit totals do not balance for the journal entry.

errors.title: Immutable ledger violation
errors.message: Attempted update or delete on a posted ledger record.

errors.title: Internal error
errors.message: An unexpected error occurred.

errors.title: Service unavailable
errors.message: Dependency is temporarily unavailable.

errors.title: Rate limited
errors.message: Too many requests; retry after backoff.
